nasb.text: When he came in, he ate and drank; and he said, “See now to this cursed woman and bury her, for she is a king’s daughter.”

esv.text: Then he went in and ate and drank. And he said, “See now to this cursed woman and bury her, for she is a king’s daughter.”

cnv.text: 耶戶進入屋內，又吃又喝，然後說：“你們去料理那被咒詛的婦人，把她埋了，因為她是王的女兒。”

ccb.text: 进入王宫，大吃大喝，然后吩咐部下说：“把那受咒诅的妇人埋了，她毕竟是王的女儿。”
